name: Chicken with Chocolate Sauce (Chicken Mole)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a casserole, heat the olive oil and cook the garlic for a few moments to flavor the oil.
2. Add the chicken and brown it. Remove the chicken from the pan.
3. In the remaining fat, cook the onion, green pepper, pimento, and tomatoes over gentle heat for 10 minutes.
4. Add the chili powder, stirring well to combine.
5. Incorporate the broth, almonds, raisins, seasonings (nutmeg, cinnamon, pepper, orange rind), and simmer, covered, for an additional 30 minutes.
6. Stir in the chocolate until it is melted.
7. Return the chicken to the casserole, spooning the sauce over the top.
8. Bake, covered, at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until the chicken is tender.
9. Warm the rum by itself, ignite it carefully, and pour it over the contents of the casserole. Allow to stand for a few minutes before serving.
